titleStmt.title: SII 37.535: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 535. (A.R. No. B 37 of 1943-44.) Vēṁpeṇṭa, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1651 (current) Saumya, Phāḷguṇa śu. 10, corresponding to 1730 A.D. February 10, Monday.
It mentions the construction of a temple to god Śiva and consecration of Umā and Mahēśvara therein by Channamarāju, son of Yeṟṟamarāju and grandson of Jūlakaṁṭi Chennamarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka varṣaṁbulu 1651 Agu
nēṭi saumyanāma saṁvvatsara phālguṇa śu 10 lu . śrīmatu veṁpeṭi
jālakaṁṭi caṁnamarāju pautṛḍaina yaṟṟamarāju putṛḍaina caṁnna
marāju śivālayaṁ kaṭṭiṁcci Umāmahēśvarula pratiṣṭha śē
śina dharmaśāsanaṁ . pratiṣṭhakālamaṁdu sthala parasthalaṁvāru
śivārpaṇaṁgānu svāmiki naṁdādīpārādhanalakugānu yi
ccina kṣētrālu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu naḍipiṁccina vāri
ki śidhiṁccunu . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ para
dattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattā niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānācrēyōnupālanaṁ
dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
dharmaśrutōvā dṛṣṭōvā kṛtōvā kāritōpivā . Anu
mōditōvā rājēṁdra nayatīṁdrapuraṁ janaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 37.535 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
